notes: A default in-game HUD authored through the M7 T4 `context.ui` TypeScript surface (R-UI-001, owner ruling (a): a TS retained-tree API with CSS-like style props, NOT an HTML/CSS parser). This is the declarative few-shot form of what the authored script `scripts/hud.ts` builds at runtime on the V8 host: a column HUD panel with a score label + a health bar (each read-only data-bound to a numeric state query) and a play button whose onClick scores points through the UI->state action path. UI is presentation (D6): the tree lives outside the sim World, registers no hashed sim component, and its state store folds into no state hash. Node `id`s are L-33 lowercase hex (16 chars) — this standalone few-shot kind dir is exempt from the validate/canonical gate, but authors the canonical form. Rendering (text glyphs, GPU draw) arrives with the a6 screen-space backend + a7/a8 text; this authored tree is fully headless/CI-assertable today.
